statement.latex: Let$$be a countably infinite set. For$k 2$define a$k$-section\/ of$$to be a partition of$$as union of$k$infinite sets. [r]{b)} Does there exist a group that is transitive on$k$-sections but not on$(k + 1)$-sections?
